title: Transport doc wrong: ?server= now validated at construction time
description: The # Transport section says 'The server address is parsed at first use, not at from_uri construction time.' This was true before the eager ?server= validation was added. Now ?server= is validated at from_uri() (make_transport called in from_uri). WOLFHSM_SERVER is still validated lazily. The doc contradicts the code for the ?server= case. Fix: update the Transport section to reflect the split: ?server= validated at construction, WOLFHSM_SERVER validated at first use.
